## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests added (if touching infrastructure adapters)
- [ ] JavaDoc added for all new public methods
- [ ] `./gradlew spotlessCheck` passes locally
- [ ] `./gradlew javadoc` compiles without warnings
- [ ] README updated (if adding new configuration properties or starter)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added under `[Unreleased]`
